src.mesh_generation.spherical_coord_utils module¶

src.mesh_generation.spherical_coord_utils.cart_to_unit_sphere_coords(xyz)¶

Convert unit-sphere Cartesian coordinates to spherical (lat, lon).

Parameters:
xyzArray[tuple[elem_idx, gll_idx, gll_idx, 3], Float]

Unit-sphere Cartesian coordinates (x, y, z).

Returns:
latlonArray[tuple[elem_idx, gll_idx, gll_idx, 2], Float]

Spherical coordinates (latitude, longitude) in radians, with longitude in [0, 2π).

src.mesh_generation.spherical_coord_utils.cart_to_unit_sphere_coords_jacobian(xyz)¶

Compute the Jacobian mapping Cartesian velocity components to spherical.

Returns ∂(lat,lon) / ∂(x,y,z) at each GLL node, i.e. the 2×3 matrix that converts a 3-D Cartesian velocity to the corresponding physical (u_lat, u_lon) wind components.

Parameters:
xyzArray[tuple[elem_idx, gll_idx, gll_idx, 3], Float]

Unit-sphere Cartesian coordinates (x, y, z).

Returns:
jacobianArray[tuple[elem_idx, gll_idx, gll_idx, 2, 3], Float]

Jacobian ∂(lat,lon)/∂(x,y,z) at each node.

src.mesh_generation.spherical_coord_utils.unit_sphere_to_cart_coords(latlon)¶

Convert spherical (lat, lon) coordinates to unit-sphere Cartesian coordinates.

Parameters:
latlonArray[…, 2]

Array whose last axis contains (latitude, longitude) in radians.

Returns:
cartArray[…, 3]

Unit-sphere Cartesian coordinates (x, y, z).

src.mesh_generation.spherical_coord_utils.unit_sphere_to_cart_coords_jacobian(latlon)¶

Compute the Jacobian mapping spherical velocity components to Cartesian.

Returns ∂(x,y,z) / ∂(lat,lon) at each GLL node, i.e. the 3×2 matrix that converts a physical (u_lat, u_lon) wind vector to the corresponding 3-D Cartesian velocity.

Parameters:
latlonArray[tuple[elem_idx, gll_idx, gll_idx, 2], Float]

Spherical coordinates (latitude, longitude) in radians.

Returns:
jacobianArray[tuple[elem_idx, gll_idx, gll_idx, 3, 2], Float]

Jacobian ∂(x,y,z)/∂(lat,lon) at each node.

pyses
